what: Probe β piece 3 — record-beating exact max-clique on the 10 smallest non-tight Brouwer cells
verdict: RED on record-beating (0 beats); but 10/10 PROVED EXACT (max-clique = best_known, optimality proved) — an independent cross-check of Brouwer (10/10 lower bounds tight) and a minor sound result (closes the missing upper-bound proof for those cells)
structural_finding: tractable = already optimal; open = intractable for naive search. The smallest non-tight cells are all ALREADY TIGHT (exact max-clique = best_known); the genuinely-open cells have C(n,w) too large for pure-stdlib exhaustive max-clique. This is the SAME wall as the prior 4 probes, now in the record-factory domain (5th converging confirmation).
pipeline_complete: all 3 Probe β pieces built + validated: (1) Lean witness-checker (genuinely Q.E.D.), (2) automated Brouwer oracle (α-safeguarded), (3) max-clique search + non-triviality carve-out. End-to-end sound; produced a minor genuine result (10 exactness proofs).
carve_out: record_is_nontrivial(n,d,w,found) = is_improvement; wiring into lean_cli's triviality gate DEFERRED (0 beats => moot; avoid a premature trust-edge change)
what_a_real_shot_needs: CP-SAT/ILP (not pure stdlib; ortools unavailable here) + serious compute on the LARGE open cells, with still-modest odds (witnesses rated this the best-remaining-autonomous-bet but uncertain)
strategic_home: verification amplification — and the checker + oracle are directly reusable there
